summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KatyaExim CMS Dashboard - both backend APIs and frontend UI functionality tested successfully

ui_bugs.issue: Wrong password error message not displaying properly on first attempt
Hero fields not pre-populated on initial load - content loads after panel is visible

integration_issues.issue: Contact form fields use different selectors than expected (not using 'name' attributes)

passed_tests: Admin login rejection with wrong password
Dashboard loads with all sidebar sections (General Info, Products, Gallery, Certificates, Image Manager)
General Info panel with Hero, About, and Contact fields
Products panel shows all 6 product cards with editable fields
Gallery panel shows all 5 gallery labels
Certificates panel shows all 3 certificate cards
Image Manager shows logo.png in library
Save Changes button modifies and saves content to index.html
Live Preview button shows iframe of live site
Logout functionality returns to login screen
Main website renders correctly with all sections
All backend API endpoints (12/12) working correctly
